title: Count distinct giving wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1 (col0 Int32, col1 Float64, col2 String, col3 UInt8);
INSERT INTO tab1 VALUES (10, 20.5, 'test1', 1), (30, NULL, 'test2', 0), (50, 15.0, NULL, 1);
CREATE TABLE tab2 (colA Int32, colB Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY colA;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT col1 + 10) AS distinct_count FROM tab1 WHERE col3 = 1;
key_bug_features: COUNT DISTINCT with arithmetic operation on constant
